item.title: Bowers & Wilkins Px7 S3 Review: Stronger Build, Sweeter Sound
item.description: Bowers & Wilkins’ latest Px7 headphones keep sound and style at the forefront, with brilliant results.

item.title: This AI Tool Will Tell You to Stop Slacking Off
item.description: Fomi watches you work, then scolds you when your attention wanders. It’s helpful, but there are privacy issues to consider.

item.title: How to Organize Safely in the Age of Surveillance
item.description: From threat modeling to encrypted collaboration apps, we’ve collected experts’ tips and tools for safely and effectively building a group—even while b...

item.title: OpenAI taps Tata for 100MW AI data center capacity in India, eyes 1GW
item.description: OpenAI also plans to expand its presence in India with new offices in Mumbai and Bengaluru later this year.

item.title: OpenAI deepens India push with Pine Labs fintech partnership
item.description: OpenAI moves beyond ChatGPT in India with a Pine Labs deal targeting enterprise payments and AI-driven commerce.
